subcodes.first_line: O ye true friends! In the blessed verse He saith: "As to those who say 'Our Lord is God' and then stand steadfast, the angels descend upon them." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی  در آیهٴ مبارکه میفرماید انّ الّذین قالوا ربّنا اللّه ثمّ استقاموا تتنزّل علیهم الملائکه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
